creator: gary@velocity-servers.net
text:
I've created a patch file that contains the nfe(4) driver from yongari's
nfe site (nfe-20071124.tar.gz). I've modified them to be built in the
kernel as well as a module. They all pass any local tests I have, and
they work flawlessly on some Asus boards I have here to test.

These drivers currently lack a man page, so I might consider writing it
or porting it over from RELENG_7 (which should be fine).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
